---
title: "Sea Spleenwort and Other Stories, The. By the author of “The Heir of Redclyffe.”"
---

## Sea Spleenwort and Other Stories, The. By the author of “The Heir of Redclyffe.”

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1862
**Genre:** Fiction
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** Groombridge and Sons, 5, Paternoster Row, London.

### Notes

This contained ‘The Sea Spleenwort’, ‘The Mice at Play’ and ‘The Strayed Falcon’. A number of other Magnet stories by others seem also to have been bound up in this way and published in Groombridge’s gift book series (in which <i>Historical Dramas</i> also appeared).

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
